Recommendation: Add <meta name="description" content="..."> with a concise 150-160 character summary of the page content.

Issue: Missing Open Graph meta tags (og:title og:description og:image og:url og:type)
Recommendation: Add Open Graph tags for better social media sharing: <meta property="og:title" content="..."> etc.

Issue: Missing Twitter Card meta tags (twitter:card twitter:title twitter:description twitter:image)
Recommendation: Add Twitter Card tags: <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"> etc.
Add <link rel="canonical" href="https://example.com/"> to prevent duplicate content issues.
Add <meta name="robots" content="index, follow"> to explicitly control crawler behavior.

Issue: Title tag is generic - ""Sample Page"" is not descriptive or keyword-rich
Recommendation: Use a descriptive title (50-60 characters) containing primary keywords, e.g. "Your Brand - Primary Keyword | Secondary Keyword".
If targeting multiple languages/regions, add <link rel="alternate" hreflang="x" href="..."> tags.
Add JSON-LD <script type="application/ld+json"> with at minimum a WebPage or Organization schema.

Issue: Missing Organization or WebSite schema markup
Recommendation: Add Organization schema with name, url, logo, and sameAs properties for brand recognition in search results.
Add BreadcrumbList schema to enable breadcrumb display in search results.
Consider adding SearchAction (sitelinks searchbox) or SiteNavigationElement for enhanced SERP features.

Issue: Image missing alt attribute - hurts both accessibility and image SEO
Recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute: .
Use media="print" onload="this.media='all'" or preload pattern to avoid render-blocking.

Issue: Missing font-display: swap causes invisible text during font load (FOIT)
Recommendation: Add font-display: swap; to the @font-face declaration to improve perceived load time.
Add <link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico"> and optionally apple-touch-icon for better branding in tabs and bookmarks.
